name: Impossible Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Corn syrup; light or dark
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 9" x 1-1/4 inches.
3. Sprinkle pecans in the plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients together until smooth: 15 seconds in a blender on High or 1 minute with a hand beater.
5. Pour mixture into the plate.
6. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 50-55 minutes.
7. Cool.
